title: MISO LMP Real Time 5 Min Ex Post Final JSON API
description:
Final Ex Post real-time five-minute LMPs in MISO. These are the LMPs calculated after the publication of Preliminary real-time LMPs by MISO following the approval of each Unit Dispatch System (UDS) case.

The Final values are not available immediately in real-time, but calculated via an offline process throughout the operating day and into the next day.

See MISO's *BPM 002 - Energy and Operating Reserves* for additional discussion.
